questions.question: The product of any odd integer and any even integer is always:
questions.explanation: Any product with at least one even factor is even. Odd × Even = Even.

questions.question: What is the units digit of 7⁴?
questions.explanation: Units digit cycle for 7: 7,9,3,1 (period 4). 7⁴ is at position 4 in the cycle → units digit is 1.

questions.question: When positive integer n is divided by 5, the remainder is 3. What is the remainder when 2n is divided by 5?
questions.explanation: n = 5q+3, so 2n = 10q+6 = 10q+5+1. The 10q+5 is divisible by 5, leaving remainder 1.

questions.question: If x is an even integer, which of the following must be odd?
questions.explanation: x is even, so x+1 is always odd (even+odd=odd). x+2, 2x, and x² are all even when x is even.

questions.question: What is the sum of all odd integers from 1 to 19?
questions.explanation: There are 10 odd integers (1,3,5,...,19). Sum of first k odd integers = k². 10² = 100.

questions.question: What is the remainder when 2¹⁰ is divided by 7?
